request.text: I need a public-facing assistant for my site that routes buyers, support issues, and product requests.
request.summary: Public custom build request for a route-aware website assistant.

repo_targets.name: website
repo_targets.reason: Primary public site surface, routing UI, and user-facing copy.

repo_targets.name: control_plane
repo_targets.reason: Automation, publishing, and supporting workflow logic if needed.

next_step: Open the website repo first, preserve the assistant-first model, and implement the public-facing assistant changes before widening scope into control-plane automation.
